# 成本模型 (cost_model)

> V10 单项目端到端 ¥ 拆解。所有单价集中在 `tools/data_models/cost_model.py:UNIT_PRICES`。

## 1. 基准场景

| 参数 | 值 |
| --- | --- |
| episodes | 10 |
| shots_per_ep | 16 |
| duration_per_shot_s | 5.00 |
| total_shots | 160 |
| total_seconds | 800 |
| engine | manju_agent |
| expected_views | 1,000 |
